# Transparency not working on Windows 11 #1026

![@UmGarcia](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8272623?u=1750e93382ba27b49740f437e383bd2498add2e7&v=4&size=80)

## Description

![@UmGarcia](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8272623?u=1750e93382ba27b49740f437e383bd2498add2e7&v=4&size=48)

Using title bar example code and others codes the transparency don't work on windows 11 using version 0.33.0

[![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/8272623/268457457-1fed5b98-ba3c-4b22-9f1c-23369e8326a2.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ASwEgAs_lHRylM3LrNr5Hi6tSDimeekCTADFiwIe4nI)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/8272623/268457457-1fed5b98-ba3c-4b22-9f1c-23369e8326a2.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ASwEgAs_lHRylM3LrNr5Hi6tSDimeekCTADFiwIe4nI)

![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/8272623/268457457-1fed5b98-ba3c-4b22-9f1c-23369e8326a2.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ASwEgAs_lHRylM3LrNr5Hi6tSDimeekCTADFiwIe4nI)

When I maximize and minimize the window it becomes transparent, but with borders:

[![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/8272623/268457502-d7cf10d1-b56e-4956-a7ee-24c26487a74b.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..PqDTs5qSWounKhp4ZF3IiWYKjGxwfLMF6Z1zF_mT24M)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/8272623/268457502-d7cf10d1-b56e-4956-a7ee-24c26487a74b.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..PqDTs5qSWounKhp4ZF3IiWYKjGxwfLMF6Z1zF_mT24M)

![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/8272623/268457502-d7cf10d1-b56e-4956-a7ee-24c26487a74b.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..PqDTs5qSWounKhp4ZF3IiWYKjGxwfLMF6Z1zF_mT24M)

When using version 0.24.4 the screen respects transparency:

[![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/8272623/268457619-134864e2-4a0d-4e2d-93a1-a0098c4df685.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jYz1ca2mv_-pS7OMKEkkimJ1IDb_Rq4fOAPX49u0hlM)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/8272623/268457619-134864e2-4a0d-4e2d-93a1-a0098c4df685.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jYz1ca2mv_-pS7OMKEkkimJ1IDb_Rq4fOAPX49u0hlM)

![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/8272623/268457619-134864e2-4a0d-4e2d-93a1-a0098c4df685.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jYz1ca2mv_-pS7OMKEkkimJ1IDb_Rq4fOAPX49u0hlM)

I'm new using WRY and Rust, so I have no idea what the problem could be, but I validated that all versions above 0.24.4 are not complying with transparency in Windows 11.

**Would you want to assign yourself to resolve this bug?**
